query: SELECT count(*) FROM singer
question: Quantos cantores existem?

query: SELECT name, country FROM singer ORDER BY age DESC
question: Quais são os nomes e países dos cantores ordenados por idade de forma decrescente?

query: SELECT avg(age), min(age), max(age) FROM singer WHERE country = 'France'
question: Qual é a média, mínimo e máximo de idade dos cantores da França?

query: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM singer WHERE age > 20
question: Quais são os países distintos dos cantores com mais de 20 anos?

query: SELECT name FROM singer WHERE age = (SELECT max(age) FROM singer)
question: Qual é o nome do cantor mais velho?

query: SELECT T2.concert_name, T2.theme, count(*) FROM singer_in_concert AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.concert_id = T2.concert_id GROUP BY T2.concert_id
question: Qual é o nome, tema e número de cantores em cada concerto?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN singer_in_concert AS T2 ON T1.singer_id = T2.singer_id JOIN concert AS T3 ON T2.concert_id = T3.concert_id WHERE T3.year = 2014
question: Quais cantores participaram de concertos em 2014?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM pets WHERE weight > 10
question: Quantos animais de estimação têm peso maior que 10?

query: SELECT DISTINCT pet_type FROM pets
question: Quais são os tipos de animais de estimação existentes?

query: SELECT T1.fname, T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid = T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T3.petid = T2.petid WHERE T3.pet_type = 'cat'
question: Quais são os nomes e idades dos estudantes que têm gatos?

query: SELECT fname FROM student WHERE stuid NOT IN (SELECT stuid FROM has_pet)
question: Quais estudantes não têm animais de estimação?

query: SELECT max(weight), min(weight) FROM pets WHERE pet_type = 'dog'
question: Qual é o peso máximo e mínimo dos cães?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM cars_data WHERE horsepower > 150
question: Quantos carros têm mais de 150 cavalos de potência?

query: SELECT T1.make FROM car_names AS T1 JOIN cars_data AS T2 ON T1.makeid = T2.id WHERE T2.mpg = (SELECT max(mpg) FROM cars_data)
question: Qual é a marca do carro com maior eficiência de combustível?

query: SELECT avg(mpg), avg(horsepower) FROM cars_data WHERE cylinders = 4
question: Qual é a média de mpg e potência dos carros com 4 cilindros?

query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.model FROM model_list AS T1 JOIN car_makers AS T2 ON T1.maker = T2.id WHERE T2.country = 'usa'
question: Quais são os modelos de carros fabricados nos EUA?

query: SELECT cylinders, count(*) FROM cars_data GROUP BY cylinders ORDER BY count(*) DESC
question: Quantos carros existem para cada número de cilindros, em ordem decrescente?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM airlines
question: Quantas companhias aéreas existem?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.airline WHERE T2.destairport = 'AHD'
question: Quais companhias aéreas têm voos com destino ao aeroporto AHD?

query: SELECT T2.city, count(*) FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.destairport = T2.airportcode GROUP BY T1.destairport ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são as 5 cidades de destino mais populares em número de voos?

query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM airlines AS T1 JOIN flights AS T2 ON T1.uid = T2.airline WHERE T2.sourceairport = 'APG' AND T2.destairport = 'CVO'
question: Quais companhias aéreas operam voos de APG para CVO?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM employee
question: Quantos funcionários existem?

query: SELECT name, city FROM employee ORDER BY age
question: Quais são os nomes e cidades dos funcionários ordenados por idade?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM employee AS T1 JOIN hiring AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.employee_id JOIN shop AS T3 ON T2.shop_id = T3.shop_id WHERE T3.name = 'Pear'
question: Quais funcionários trabalham na loja chamada Pear?

query: SELECT T2.name, sum(T1.num_of_employee) FROM shop AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id GROUP BY T2.district_id
question: Qual é o total de funcionários por distrito?

query: SELECT name FROM shop WHERE num_of_employee > (SELECT avg(num_of_employee) FROM shop)
question: Quais lojas têm mais funcionários do que a média?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM students
question: Quantos estudantes estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT first_name, last_name, date_of_birth FROM students ORDER BY date_of_birth ASC LIMIT 10
question: Quais são os 10 estudantes mais jovens?

query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.degree_summary_name FROM students AS T1 JOIN degree_programs AS T2 ON T1.current_address_id = T2.department_id
question: Quais estudantes estão matriculados em qual programa de graduação?

query: SELECT count(DISTINCT department_id) FROM degree_programs
question: Quantos departamentos oferecem programas de graduação?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM TV_Channel
question: Quantos canais de televisão existem?

query: SELECT series_name, country FROM TV_series ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são as 5 séries de TV com as melhores avaliações?

query: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_series AS T1 JOIN TV_Channel AS T2 ON T1.Channel = T2.id WHERE T2.language = 'English'
question: Quais séries de TV são transmitidas em canais em inglês?

query: SELECT avg(rating) FROM Cartoon WHERE directed_by = 'Ben Jones'
question: Qual é a avaliação média dos desenhos animados dirigidos por Ben Jones?

query: SELECT country, count(*) FROM TV_Channel GROUP BY country HAVING count(*) > 2
question: Quais países têm mais de 2 canais de televisão?

query: SELECT name, population FROM country ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 10
question: Quais são os 10 países mais populosos?

query: SELECT name, surfacearea FROM country WHERE continent = 'South America' ORDER BY surfacearea DESC
question: Quais países da América do Sul têm maior área superficial?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM city AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.countrycode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Brazil' ORDER BY T1.population DESC LIMIT 1
question: Qual é a cidade mais populosa do Brasil?

query: SELECT count(DISTINCT language) FROM countrylanguage WHERE isofficial = 'T'
question: Quantas línguas oficiais existem no mundo?

query: SELECT continent, avg(gnp) FROM country GROUP BY continent
question: Qual é o PNB médio por continente?

query: SELECT name FROM country WHERE lifeexpectancy > 80 AND continent = 'Europe'
question: Quais países europeus têm expectativa de vida acima de 80 anos?

query: SELECT T2.language, count(*) FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.countrycode WHERE T1.continent = 'Africa' GROUP BY T2.language ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 3
question: Quais são as 3 línguas mais faladas na África?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM highschooler
question: Quantos alunos do ensino médio estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT name FROM highschooler WHERE grade = 10
question: Quais são os alunos da décima série?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.student_id GROUP BY T2.student_id HAVING count(*) >= 3
question: Quais estudantes têm pelo menos 3 amigos?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN likes AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.liked_id GROUP BY T2.liked_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1
question: Qual estudante é mais querido pelos outros?

query: SELECT name FROM highschooler WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT student_id FROM friend)
question: Quais estudantes não têm amigos cadastrados?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM orchestra
question: Quantas orquestras estão registradas?

query: SELECT name, major_orchestra FROM orchestra ORDER BY year_of_founded ASC
question: Quais orquestras são as mais antigas?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM conductor AS T1 JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.conductor_id = T2.conductor_id WHERE T2.record_company = 'RCA Red Seal'
question: Quais maestros trabalham com orquestras da gravadora RCA Red Seal?

query: SELECT T2.performance_type, count(*) FROM orchestra AS T1 JOIN performance AS T2 ON T1.orchestra_id = T2.orchestra_id GROUP BY T2.performance_type
question: Quantas performances de cada tipo foram realizadas?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM poker_player
question: Quantos jogadores de poker estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT earnings, best_finish FROM poker_player ORDER BY earnings DESC LIMIT 1
question: Quais são os ganhos e melhor resultado do jogador com maiores ganhos?

query: SELECT avg(earnings), max(earnings), min(earnings) FROM poker_player
question: Qual é a média, máximo e mínimo de ganhos entre os jogadores de poker?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.people_id = T2.people_id WHERE T2.final_table_made > 20
question: Quais jogadores chegaram à mesa final mais de 20 vezes?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM battle
question: Quantas batalhas estão registradas?

query: SELECT name, result FROM battle ORDER BY id ASC
question: Quais são os nomes e resultados das batalhas em ordem cronológica?

query: SELECT T1.name, count(T2.id) FROM battle AS T1 JOIN death AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.killed_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(T2.id) DESC
question: Quantas mortes ocorreram em cada batalha?

query: SELECT T2.name FROM ship AS T2 WHERE T2.id NOT IN (SELECT lost_in_battle FROM death)
question: Quais navios nunca foram envolvidos em mortes?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM players WHERE country_code = 'BRA'
question: Quantas jogadoras de tênis são do Brasil?

query: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM players WHERE hand = 'L' AND country_code = 'USA'
question: Quais são as jogadoras americanas canhotas?

query: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, count(*) FROM players AS T1 JOIN matches AS T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.winner_id GROUP BY T2.winner_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são as 5 jogadoras com mais vitórias?

query: SELECT avg(winner_rank_points), avg(loser_rank_points) FROM matches WHERE tourney_name = 'Wimbledon'
question: Qual é a média de pontos de ranking de vencedoras e perdedoras em Wimbledon?

query: SELECT surface, count(*) FROM matches GROUP BY surface
question: Quantas partidas foram jogadas em cada tipo de superfície?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM Templates
question: Quantos templates existem?

query: SELECT template_type_code, count(*) FROM Templates GROUP BY template_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC
question: Quantos templates existem de cada tipo?

query: SELECT T1.document_name FROM Documents AS T1 JOIN Templates AS T2 ON T1.template_id = T2.template_id WHERE T2.template_type_code = 'PP'
question: Quais documentos usam templates do tipo PP?

query: SELECT document_name FROM Documents WHERE document_name LIKE '%CV%'
question: Quais documentos têm 'CV' no nome?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM museum
question: Quantos museus existem?

query: SELECT name, open_year FROM museum ORDER BY open_year ASC
question: Quais museus foram abertos primeiro?

query: SELECT T1.name, count(T2.visitor_id) FROM museum AS T1 JOIN visit AS T2 ON T1.museum_id = T2.museum_id GROUP BY T1.museum_id ORDER BY count(T2.visitor_id) DESC
question: Quais museus recebem mais visitantes?

query: SELECT avg(num_of_staff) FROM museum WHERE open_year > 2000
question: Qual é o número médio de funcionários nos museus abertos após 2000?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM visitor AS T1 JOIN visit AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.visitor_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T2.total_spent) > 100
question: Quais visitantes gastaram mais de 100 no total?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM documents
question: Qual é o total de documentos no sistema?

query: SELECT document_type_code, count(*) FROM documents GROUP BY document_type_code
question: Quantos documentos existem por tipo?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM services
question: Quantos serviços estão disponíveis?

query: SELECT service_name, service_fee FROM services ORDER BY service_fee DESC
question: Quais serviços têm maior taxa?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM customers AS T1 JOIN customers_services AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T1.customer_id HAVING count(*) >= 3
question: Quais clientes usam pelo menos 3 serviços?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM race
question: Quantas corridas estão registradas?

query: SELECT name, class, date FROM race ORDER BY date ASC
question: Quais são as corridas em ordem de data?

query: SELECT T1.name, T2.name FROM race AS T1 JOIN track AS T2 ON T1.track_id = T2.track_id
question: Quais são as corridas e seus respectivos circuitos?

query: SELECT avg(seating), max(seating) FROM track
question: Qual é a capacidade média e máxima dos circuitos de corrida?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM manufacturer
question: Quantos fabricantes estão registrados?

query: SELECT T1.name, T2.name FROM manufacturer AS T1 JOIN furniture AS T2 ON T1.manufacturer_id = T2.manufacturer_id
question: Quais móveis são produzidos por quais fabricantes?

query: SELECT name, market_share FROM manufacturer ORDER BY market_share DESC LIMIT 3
question: Quais são os 3 fabricantes com maior participação de mercado?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM manufacturer AS T1 WHERE T1.manufacturer_id NOT IN (SELECT manufacturer_id FROM furniture)
question: Quais fabricantes não produzem nenhum móvel?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM county
question: Quantos condados existem?

query: SELECT county_name, population FROM county ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são os 5 condados mais populosos?

query: SELECT T1.county_name, count(T2.zip_code) FROM county AS T1 JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.county_id = T2.county_id GROUP BY T1.county_id
question: Quantos CEPs cada condado possui?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM hospital
question: Quantos hospitais estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT name, state FROM hospital WHERE hospital_type = 'Critical Access Hospitals' ORDER BY name
question: Quais são os hospitais de acesso crítico em ordem alfabética?

query: SELECT state, count(*) FROM hospital GROUP BY state ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10
question: Quais estados têm o maior número de hospitais?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM physician AS T1 JOIN affiliated_with AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.physician JOIN department AS T3 ON T2.department = T3.department_id WHERE T3.name = 'General Internal Medicine'
question: Quais médicos estão afiliados ao departamento de Medicina Interna Geral?

query: SELECT T1.name, T2.name, T3.start FROM physician AS T1 JOIN patient AS T2 ON T1.employee_id = T2.pcp JOIN appointment AS T3 ON T2.ssn = T3.patient WHERE T3.start LIKE '2008%'
question: Quais são os médicos, pacientes e datas das consultas em 2008?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM author
question: Quantos autores estão registrados?

query: SELECT T1.name, count(T2.paper_id) FROM author AS T1 JOIN writes AS T2 ON T1.aid = T2.aid GROUP BY T1.aid ORDER BY count(T2.paper_id) DESC LIMIT 10
question: Quais são os 10 autores com mais publicações?

query: SELECT T1.name FROM journal AS T1 JOIN publication AS T2 ON T1.jid = T2.jid GROUP BY T1.jid HAVING count(*) > 50
question: Quais revistas acadêmicas têm mais de 50 publicações?

query: SELECT DISTINCT T1.name FROM author AS T1 JOIN writes AS T2 ON T1.aid = T2.aid JOIN paper AS T3 ON T2.paper_id = T3.paper_id WHERE T3.year > 2010
question: Quais autores publicaram artigos após 2010?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM player
question: Quantos jogadores de futebol estão registrados?

query: SELECT player_name, birthday FROM player ORDER BY birthday ASC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são os 5 jogadores mais velhos?

query: SELECT avg(overall_rating) FROM player_attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
question: Qual é a avaliação média dos jogadores que preferem o pé direito?

query: SELECT T1.team_long_name, count(T2.match_id) FROM team AS T1 JOIN match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.home_team_api_id GROUP BY T1.team_api_id ORDER BY count(T2.match_id) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais times jogaram mais partidas em casa?

query: SELECT T1.league_name, avg(T2.home_team_goal + T2.away_team_goal) FROM league AS T1 JOIN match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id GROUP BY T1.id
question: Qual é a média de gols por jogo em cada liga?

query: SELECT player_name FROM player WHERE height > 190 AND weight < 85
question: Quais jogadores têm mais de 190 cm de altura e menos de 85 kg?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM properties
question: Quantos imóveis estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT property_type_code, count(*) FROM properties GROUP BY property_type_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC
question: Qual é a quantidade de imóveis por tipo?

query: SELECT T1.other_property_details FROM properties AS T1 ORDER BY T1.property_id LIMIT 5
question: Quais são os detalhes dos 5 primeiros imóveis?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM station
question: Quantas estações de bicicleta existem?

query: SELECT name, city FROM station ORDER BY installation_date ASC LIMIT 5
question: Quais foram as 5 primeiras estações inauguradas?

query: SELECT city, avg(dock_count) FROM station GROUP BY city
question: Qual é a média de docas por cidade?

query: SELECT T1.name, count(T2.id) FROM station AS T1 JOIN trip AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.start_station_id GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY count(T2.id) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são as 5 estações com mais viagens iniciadas?

query: SELECT avg(duration) FROM trip WHERE subscription_type = 'Subscriber'
question: Qual é a duração média das viagens de assinantes?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM artist
question: Quantos artistas estão cadastrados?

query: SELECT T1.artist_name, count(T2.song_id) FROM artist AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.artist_id = T2.artist_id GROUP BY T1.artist_id ORDER BY count(T2.song_id) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são os 5 artistas com mais músicas?

query: SELECT DISTINCT genre_id FROM song WHERE downloads > 1000000
question: Quais gêneros têm músicas com mais de 1 milhão de downloads?

query: SELECT T1.artist_name FROM artist AS T1 WHERE T1.artist_id NOT IN (SELECT artist_id FROM song WHERE downloads > 500000)
question: Quais artistas não têm nenhuma música com mais de 500 mil downloads?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM wine
question: Quantos vinhos estão catalogados?

query: SELECT No, Grape, Winery FROM wine ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 10
question: Quais são os 10 vinhos com maior pontuação?

query: SELECT Appelation, count(*) FROM wine GROUP BY Appelation ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são as 5 regiões com mais vinhos catalogados?

query: SELECT avg(Score), min(Score), max(Score) FROM wine WHERE Year > 2010
question: Qual é a pontuação média, mínima e máxima dos vinhos produzidos após 2010?

query: SELECT DISTINCT Grape FROM wine WHERE Score >= 95
question: Quais uvas produzem vinhos com pontuação acima de 95?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM campuses
question: Quantos campi existem no sistema CSU?

query: SELECT campus, county FROM campuses ORDER BY year ASC
question: Quais são os campi em ordem de fundação?

query: SELECT T1.campus, sum(T2.totaltextbooks) FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN enrollments AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.campus GROUP BY T1.id ORDER BY sum(T2.totaltextbooks) DESC LIMIT 3
question: Quais 3 campi têm o maior gasto total em livros?

query: SELECT T1.campus FROM campuses AS T1 JOIN degrees AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.campus WHERE T2.year = 2000 AND T2.degrees > 5000
question: Quais campi conferiram mais de 5000 graus em 2000?

query: SELECT count(*) FROM products
question: Quantos produtos estão disponíveis?

query: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 10
question: Quais são os 10 produtos mais caros?

query: SELECT T2.company_name, count(T1.order_id) FROM orders AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id GROUP BY T2.customer_id ORDER BY count(T1.order_id) DESC LIMIT 5
question: Quais são os 5 clientes que mais fizeram pedidos?

query: SELECT T1.category_name, sum(T2.unit_price * T3.quantity) FROM categories AS T1 JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.category_id = T2.category_id JOIN order_details AS T3 ON T2.product_id = T3.product_id GROUP BY T1.category_id ORDER BY sum(T2.unit_price * T3.quantity) DESC
question: Qual é o faturamento total por categoria de produto?

query: SELECT product_name FROM products WHERE units_in_stock = 0
question: Quais produtos estão sem estoque?

query: SELECT T2.company_name, T1.order_date FROM orders AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T1.ship_country = 'Brazil' ORDER BY T1.order_date DESC
question: Quais pedidos foram enviados para o Brasil?
